channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New Jersey GOP Rep. Tom Kean reveals depression diagnosis after returning to Congress
item.description: Rep. Tom Kean Jr. stated he was diagnosed with depression this year and doctors advised inpatient treatment, which caused his absence from Washington.

item.title: Zohran Mamdani's Questionable Justification for Opposing Israel
item.description: His claimed universalism serves as a cover for his irrational hostility toward Israel.

item.title: Daniel Oliver, Rest in Peace
item.description: It was an honor and a privilege to stand with Oliver on the barricades.

item.title: Thomas, Alito: In Birthright Citizenship Ruling, John Roberts Imposes 'Feudal' 'Darkness'
item.description: Congress explicitly rejected Roberts' new feudalism in the same year the Citizenship Clause was ratified.
